recent.title: Medik8 x FERMÀT|| Kick-Off Call
recent.summary: Kick-off call with Lindsey Shin (Senior Ecommerce Manager, North America). Medik8 is a global skincare brand based in London, focusing on hyper-growth in America. Goals: test new landing page strategies without changing main website, rapid A/B testing, improve conversion rates, reduce sampling costs. Two demo funnels created (Crystal Retinal + C-Tetra bundle). Weekly meetings scheduled for onboarding phase.

calls.analysis: Medik8 has had 7 total calls since Feb 9, with 5 in the last 30 days (KOC Mar 9, weekly syncs Mar 16, Mar 25, Mar 31, Apr 7). Engagement is very strong — weekly cadence fully established. The account transitioned from pre-sales (Mukul) to onboarding (Pulkit) at the KOC on Mar 9. Granola meeting notes available for all 5 post-KOC calls. Key theme across calls: design alignment with Medik8's premium brand standards has been the main blocker to go-live.

messages.text: Also, I think we are good to go on design for now. We'll revisit design once we start testing + fix the variant buttons on Crystal Retinal & Advanced Pro Collagen Peptides Moisturizer.

@Pulkit on the welcome funnel, I see the 15% badging and discount on the product grid and cart, but when you go to checkout, the discount does not apply. Can you edit so that when customers go to checkout and social15 is already applied to their basket?

Hi Lindsey, Thank you for taking the time for our sync today. Here's a recap of where we stand and what's next. Current Status: Design Updates nearly complete, PDP Integration moving forward with FERMÀT PDPs, 15% Off Badge fixed, A/B Test set up. Ready to Launch: Best Seller Funnel with product grid + hero image. Upcoming: Product-Centric Pages, May Launch, Video Landing Pages.

@Pulkit When you click on Funnels > Medik8 Welcome - Best Sellers Final > Click Preview > Scroll down to the product grid > Click Liquid Peptides Advanced MP. There are so many things we have to adjust. Please see my feedback here: [Section 3 screenshot]

Recap of call with Pulkit: 1. Cart Design: Pulkit to check customization. 2. Landing Page: Update font sizes, CTA font & corners rounded to 5 radius. 3. Using Fermat's PDP instead of own PDPs. 4. PDP: Update CTAs with styling notes. 5. Prioritize: Liquid Peptides Advanced MP, Crystal Retinal, C-Tetra Advanced, Advanced Pro Collagen+, Niacinamide Peptides, and Liquid Peptides.
Sure! Calling you on Slack huddle.
Can you hop on a call now?
No, we need this one and the PDPs ready.

@Jiyoon Cha The changes you mentioned we have implemented in the Meet the Brand: Medik8 V2 funnel. I think we can get on a quick call today and get the design completed. I thought you will be going live with this funnel itself.

I think what's been a challenge is that the feedback I gave last week hasn't been applied to any other funnels we're trying to go live with. We were supposed to go live last Friday. Can we stay close today to make sure everything is good to go today?
@Pulkit following up if this page has been updated? We need to update the CTAs Still the wrong style. Can you also update the type to be larger? [3 screenshots attached]
Thank you so much!
I will get this Funnel updated
Sure @Jiyoon Cha
@Pulkit Lindsay and I just aligned and we want this funnel to be updated in terms of design. The typography and CTAs are still off on this. [Screenshot attached]
Just following up on the above from this thread. Can we hop on a call today so we can go live tomorrow? @Pulkit
@Jiyoon Cha I have updated the funnel as per your feedback. You can see this and let me know if I should make any more changes. [Preview link shared]

Hey Jiyoon — great call yesterday! Here's a quick recap. Design Review completed, Launch Timeline: Thursday/Friday target. Typography Standards: Serif all caps 12.5% spacing, sentence case 2.5%. CTAs simplified to Learn More and Shop Now. Action items listed for both teams.
Sorry have one more. Talk soon: [Section 2 screenshot]
Sharing this ahead of our call. We can review this together. [Section 1 screenshot]

slack.analysis: Extremely active Slack channel with 20+ messages in the last 7 days. Three Medik8 stakeholders actively engaging: Lindsey Shin (strategy/go-live decisions), Jiyoon Cha (design/UX feedback), and Danielle Finn (paid media). Most recent message from Lindsey on Apr 8 indicates design is approved for now — ready to go live. Key friction point: Social15 discount code not auto-applying at checkout (reported Apr 8, needs fix). The channel shows a high-urgency, design-iteration-heavy onboarding phase with brand pushing for faster execution.
